name: ge-insurance-claims
description: Custom Gemini Enterprise A2UI insurance claims assistant agent.

skills.name: Claims Intake & Policy Triage
skills.description: Retrieves policyholder coverage limits, deductibles, and flags Ohio-specific exclusions.
examples: check the new water damage claim for Walter White

skills.name: Multimodal AI Damage Assessment
skills.description: Analyzes uploaded property damage photos side-by-side and extracts water depth, flooring material, and cause.

skills.name: Risk & Historical Claims Analytics
skills.description: Queries 5-year claim history, loyalty tiers, and displays a visual risk score gauge with fraud verification.

skills.name: Repair Estimation & Contractor Map Dispatch
skills.description: Calculates itemized net settlement payouts and displays an interactive Columbus, OH contractor dispatch map.
